sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52094" key="kakizo/texnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰκιζότεχνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n52094.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">finding fault with one's scraftsmanship, meticulous</tr_>, of the sculptor Callimachus, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l. in</abbr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:26:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.26.7</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κατατηξίτεχνος</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
